lanes.name: ui-widget-materialization
lanes.objective: Upgrade UI codegen output to render core MIPLATFORM tags with deterministic React+MUI widget mappings and source trace attributes.
deliverables: Extend src/migrator/ui_codegen.py with core widget mapping policy (Button/Edit/Static/Combo/Grid/Container)
Keep deterministic naming/output and source trace metadata in generated TSX
Add unit tests validating mapped JSX output for representative fixture screens
Document mapping limitations and fallback policy in lane handoff

lanes.name: behavior-store-scaffold
lanes.objective: Generate Zustand state/action scaffolds from extracted bindings/events/transactions so generated UI has deterministic behavior integration anchors.
deliverables: Add behavior/store codegen module under src/migrator/ (no runtime side effects)
Generate per-screen store/action scaffold artifacts with deterministic file names
Add tests for event/transaction to action naming and duplicate handling policy
Document assumptions and unresolved runtime coupling risks in lane handoff

lanes.name: pipeline-e2e-automation
lanes.objective: Provide one-command migration execution flow that orchestrates parse/codegen/map-api/preview-sync and emits a consolidated report for user verification.
deliverables: Add CLI command for end-to-end migration orchestration (single screen scope minimum)
Emit consolidated migration summary/report JSON with generated file references
Add CLI/integration tests for success and failure paths
Update USER_MANUAL.md and README.md to reflect the new user workflow
